summary: Tested Cozii MVP backend (17 pytest cases, all pass) and mobile frontend e2e via Playwright (welcome -> signup -> space-setup -> home -> inventory -> category -> add item -> status round-trip -> login existing account). Core user-requirement 'finished item togglable back to available' is working on both backend and UI. No MongoDB _id leaks detected in any response. No runtime red-screen errors. One minor UX gripe: bottom tab bar has no per-tab testIDs which made Profile/Home tab clicks rely on visible text and occasionally hit an invisible duplicate node.

issues: Bottom tab bar buttons have no testID (e.g. tab-home, tab-inventory, tab-profile, tab-finance). Relying on visible text 'Profile'/'Home' via get_by_text sometimes matches a duplicate hidden node. Recommend adding testID on each tabBarButton for reliable UI testing.

react_native_issues.issue: Console deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow) and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated, use style.pointerEvents'. Non-blocking but should be cleaned up.

Expo reports mismatched versions for @react-native-async-storage/async-storage, expo-clipboard, expo-image-picker, expo-linear-gradient, react-native-svg. Functional on web preview but should be aligned for native builds.

action_items: Add testID props to each Tab button in app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx for reliable e2e testing (e.g., tabBarTestID='tab-home').
(Optional) Silence deprecation warnings by migrating shadow* styles to boxShadow and pointerEvents prop to style.pointerEvents.
(Optional) Run 'npx expo install --check' to align package versions with Expo SDK.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py consolidates all routes (~700 lines). Fine for MVP, but consider splitting auth/spaces/categories/items into routers as feature count grows.
GET /api/items uses query param 'status_filter' internally but spec mentions filtering by 'status'. Frontend correctly passes category_id; status filtering works. Naming mismatch is not breaking.
Google OAuth cookie sets samesite='none' secure=True - correct for cross-site preview domain. Good.
All routes consistently exclude _id via {'_id': 0} projections — verified in every response. Good hygiene.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all flows except direct Profile tab click worked; logout button testID exists but was not reachable in this run due to tab-bar selector limitation)

seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ users via /api/auth/register (test_a_*, test_b_*, test_c_*, ui_*), 1 family space 'TEST_Home' plus 'TEST Cozii Home', 1 item 'TEST_Milk_UI' via frontend, a few priced TEST_ items via backend tests. All prefixed TEST_ / test_ for easy cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview URL: https://family-wallet-21.preview.emergentagent.com. Use test@cozii.app / test1234 for login (already has a space). Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_cozii_api.py are pytest and reusable. All critical testIDs present: welcome-*, signup-*, login-*, space-setup-*, home-*, category-*, item-editor-*, profile-*. MISSING: tab bar testIDs. To click tabs, use geometric click on tab bar area OR add testIDs first.
rca_of_issue: No P0/P1 bugs found. Phase-1 MVP backend + frontend are functional and integrated. Status round-trip (finished -> available) explicitly validated end-to-end per the explicit user requirement.
